para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:10px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 机床外部盖板位于防溅板上，用途如下：

para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

table.style: border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid; head-row-background-color:#c0c0c0; alt-row-background-color:none;

para.text: 进入夹具/轴旋转工作台。
缩小机床宽度，以便装入装运箱。

para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-25px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:25px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:25px left ; font-family:Arial; font-size:10pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-25px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:25px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:25px left ;
li.text: 在取下盖子之前，请先关闭电源关。

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-25px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:25px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:25px left ;
li.text: 进入机床时要格外小心。

para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-25px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:25px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:25px left ;

text-align:center; text-indent:-25px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:25px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:25px left ;
